feat.name: Metabolic Control
feat.text: You're able to better control your body's metabolism to preserve energy. After eating a proper meal, you can go without food and water for 1 week before taking damage from starvation and thirst. You aren't fatigued during this week.

traits.name: Nagaji
traits.text: Nagaji are brawny humanoids with scaled skin and serpentine heads, many of whom serve or respect nagas.
